DP.141.0000:
Hello.
May I help you with anything?
DP.141.0001:
Hello, [0103,0000].
May I help you with anything?
DP.141.0003:
False Swipe makes wild Pokémon easier
to catch.\f
Many customers have confided that to
me recently.
DP.141.0004:
For Fire-type Pokémon, may I suggest
Fire Blast?
DP.141.0005:
The move Protect is the perfect
solution for dodging attacks.\f
Please be aware that overuse can
result in failure.
DP.141.0006:
When it is raining, the accuracy
of Thunder becomes precise.\f
Please do be careful about
the weather.
DP.141.0007:
A friend traded me a MACHOKE using
DS Wireless Communications.\f
But instead of a MACHOKE, I got
a different Pokémon!
DP.141.0008:
I wrote some secrets in my Mail
as a reminder...\f
If someone reads it...
I’m in deep trouble.
DP.141.0009:
1F: Trainers’ Zone\f
2F: Battle Collection\f
3F: TM Corner\f
4F: Poké Dolls & Goods\f
5F: Rooftop Plaza
